# Square Jam (Cave 2x2s)

This is a [Square Jam](https://puzz.link/rules.html?squarejam) with the added requirement that all 2x2 squares are connected through other 2x2 squares to the outside of the grid.

[![Click to solve on Penpa+](../../images/puzzles/2025/squareJam1.png)](https://swaroopg92.github.io/penpa-edit/#m=solve&&)
